subcodes.first_line: He, verily, bestoweth His blessings upon such as hold fast to trustworthiness, and remembereth those who fulfill their pledges. He is, in truth, the Guardian of them that act [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انه یصلی علی من تمسک بالامانه و یذکر من وفی بما عهد انه ولی العاملین کم من
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment
